title: Mixed Spice Fry Surprise
description: A kid-friendly vegetarian Polish dish featuring mixed spices and a smoky, velvety texture, perfect for a healthy snack or meal.
instructions: Slice onions and carrots into thin half-moons.
Peel potatoes, slice them in half, and chop garlic cloves.
Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add mixed spices, onion slices, and garlic cloves; sauté for about 5 minutes until fragrant.
Add chopped potatoes and carrots to the pan. Pour water over ingredients so that they are almost fully submerged.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover with a tight-fitting lid, and simmer for about 20-30 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
